_comment_mode: Runtime mode: 'arena' (multi strategy) or 'strategy' (single). Aliases accepted: 'single', 'solo', 'dashboard' → 'strategy'. Env vars: QUANTA_MODE or MODE.
_comment_env: Environment: 'simulate' (mock), 'paper' (paper trading), 'live' (real). Aliases accepted: 'sim', 'dev', 'simulation' → 'simulate'; 'prod', 'production' → 'live'; 'paper-trade', 'papertrade' → 'paper'. Env vars: QUANTA_ENV (preferred) or EXCHANGE_MODE (legacy).

exchange.name: simulator
exchange._comment_apiKey: API key for authentication (optional for public data in simulation mode)
exchange._comment_apiSecret: API secret for authentication (optional for public data in simulation mode)
exchange._comment_marketType: Market type for exchanges that support it: 'spot' or 'swap' ('perp'/'perpetual' treated as 'swap')

ai._comment_apiKey: OpenRouter API key for AI signal generation
ai._comment_model: AI model to use for trading signals
ai._comment_temperature: AI creativity level (0.0-2.0, lower = more conservative)

langsmith._comment_enabled: Enable LangSmith tracing for AI operations
langsmith._comment_apiKey: Optional LangSmith API key (overridden by LANGCHAIN_API_KEY)
langsmith._comment_project: Optional LangSmith project name (empty/omitted uses 'default' project; overridden by LANGCHAIN_PROJECT)
langsmith._comment_includeSections: Control which data sections are attached to traces

prompt._comment: Controls what the AI sees in the prompt
prompt._comment_activeGroup: Name of the prompt group to use (must exist in config/prompts/{activeGroup}.json)

candles._comment_m3: Number of 3-minute candles to include in prompt
candles._comment_h1: Number of 1-hour candles to include in prompt (optional, default: 8)
candles._comment_h4: Number of 4-hour candles to include in prompt

trading._comment_coins: List of cryptocurrency pairs to trade (without /USDT suffix)
trading._comment_cyclePeriod: Time between trading cycles in milliseconds (180000 = 3 minutes)
trading._comment_maxPositions: Maximum number of simultaneous open positions. Recommended: spot 6-10, swap 1-4
trading._comment_leverageRange: Leverage range [min, max]. Recommended: spot [1,1], swap [3,10]
trading._comment_stopLoss: Default stop loss percentage (0.05 = 5%). Recommended: spot 3-7%, swap 1-2%
trading._comment_maxRisk: Maximum risk per trade as fraction of account (0.05 = 5%). Recommended: spot 3-5%, swap 1-2%
trading._comment_marketFetchParallel: Enable parallel fetching of market data (default: true)

priceSanity._comment_enabled: Enable price sanity checks to prevent stale price orders
priceSanity._comment_maxDeviation: Maximum price deviation allowed (0.05 = 5%). Orders with deviation > this will use market price

funding._comment_warnings: Enable warnings about estimated funding drag for perpetual swaps

notifications._comment_enabled: Enable webhook notifications for trading events

logging._comment_logDir: Directory for log files (default: './logs', overridden by LOG_DIR env)
logging._comment_maxFileSize: Maximum log file size in bytes (default: 10MB = 10485760)
logging._comment_maxFiles: Number of days to keep logs (default: 14)

retry._comment_maxRetries: Maximum number of retry attempts for failed operations
retry._comment_baseDelay: Initial delay between retries in milliseconds
retry._comment_maxDelay: Maximum delay between retries in milliseconds

circuitBreaker._comment_failureThreshold: Number of consecutive failures before opening circuit
circuitBreaker._comment_resetTimeout: Time in milliseconds before attempting to close circuit
circuitBreaker._comment_halfOpenMaxAttempts: Max attempts in half-open state before deciding

rateLimit._comment_openRouterRpm: Max OpenRouter API requests per minute
rateLimit._comment_exchangeRpm: Max exchange API requests per minute

timeout._comment_aiRequest: Timeout for AI API requests in milliseconds
timeout._comment_exchangeRequest: Timeout for exchange API requests in milliseconds
timeout._comment_cycleMaxDuration: Maximum duration for a trading cycle in milliseconds

degradedMode._comment_enabled: Enable degraded mode for graceful degradation
degradedMode._comment_useMockAIOnFailure: Use mock AI when real AI fails (for testing)
degradedMode._comment_maxConsecutiveErrors: Max consecutive errors before pausing trading
degradedMode._comment_pauseOnPersistentErrors: Pause trading when error threshold is reached

simulation._comment_defaultMaxPositions: Default maximum number of open positions
simulation._comment_confirmBeforeExecute: Prompt for confirmation before executing trades

scenarios._comment_testScenarios: Available market scenarios for testing strategies

risk._comment_minConfidence: Minimum AI signal confidence required to execute (0.0-1.0)
risk._comment_maxRiskPerTrade: Maximum risk per individual trade (0.05 = 5% of account)
risk._comment_maxTotalRisk: Maximum total portfolio risk (0.30 = 30% margin used)

logging._comment_resultsDir: Directory path for saving simulation results

performance._comment_calculateSharpeRatio: Calculate Sharpe ratio for performance evaluation

mock._comment_signalInterval: Interval between signals in milliseconds (10000 = 10 seconds)
mock._comment_confidenceRange: AI confidence range for mock signals (min-max)

real._comment_apiKey: OpenRouter API key for real AI signals
real._comment_model: AI model name for signal generation
real._comment_maxRetries: Maximum API retry attempts on failure
real._comment_timeout: API request timeout in milliseconds (30000 = 30 seconds)
